system_prompt: You are an expert website auditor. Return ONLY compact JSON with keys: ai_insights and recommendations. ai_insights must include seo_structure, messaging_clarity, cta_usage, content_depth, ux_concerns. Each ai_insights field must be under 35 words. recommendations must be 3 items ordered by priority (high to low). Each recommendation item must contain: priority, issue, action, rationale. Keep each recommendation concise. Ground every statement in provided metrics. No markdown. No extra keys.
user_prompt:
Analyze this single-page website audit payload and produce the required JSON only:
{"url":"https://www.cognivusmed.com/","metrics":{"url":"https://www.cognivusmed.com/","word_count":20,"heading_counts":{"h1":1,"h2":9,"h3":41},"cta_count":13,"internal_links":6,"external_links":14,"images":5,"images_missing_alt_pct":0.0,"meta_title":"CognivusLabs - AI-Powered Continuous Health Monitoring & Automated Medicine Delivery","meta_description":"Revolutionary AI-powered wearable health monitoring system with automated medication delivery. 24/7 vital signs tracking (ECG, SpO2, temperature) with intelligent predictive analytics. Transform healthcare with CognivusLabs."},"text_excerpt":"\" Our mission is to make proactive, continuous healthcare accessible to everyone, everywhere, through the power of intelligent automation ."}

metrics.meta_title: CognivusLabs - AI-Powered Continuous Health Monitoring & Automated Medicine Delivery
metrics.meta_description: Revolutionary AI-powered wearable health monitoring system with automated medication delivery. 24/7 vital signs tracking (ECG, SpO2, temperature) with intelligent predictive analytics. Transform healthcare with CognivusLabs.

structured_model_input.text_excerpt: " Our mission is to make proactive, continuous healthcare accessible to everyone, everywhere, through the power of intelligent automation .

raw_model_output: {"ai_insights":{"seo_structure":"Strong meta title and description; good heading structure with 1 H1 and multiple H2/H3 tags; moderate internal and external links.","messaging_clarity":"Clear mission statement but very low word count limits message depth and detail.","cta_usage":"High number of CTAs (13) for a single page, potentially overwhelming users.","content_depth":"Extremely low word count (20 words) results in insufficient content depth and detail.","ux_concerns":"Limited content may reduce engagement; multiple CTAs could confuse users; few images but all have alt text."},"recommendations":[{"priority":"high","issue":"Insufficient content depth","action":"Expand page content to provide detailed information about products, benefits, and features.","rationale":"20 words is too low for SEO and user understanding, limiting engagement and search ranking."},{"priority":"medium","issue":"Excessive CTAs","action":"Reduce and prioritize CTAs to focus on primary user actions.","rationale":"13 CTAs can overwhelm users and dilute conversion focus, harming UX and effectiveness."},{"priority":"low","issue":"Limited internal linking","action":"Increase internal links to related pages or sections for better navigation and SEO.","rationale":"Only 6 internal links limit site structure benefits and user navigation opportunities."}]}
